mods.name: Playable Agent 8 + Octopus
mods.author: Claygolor
mods.description:
Do you want to be the freshest Octoling in the game? Then, you need to look like the freshest Octoling in the world!

This mod includes:
Octolings over Inklings wearing skirt and pants from Agent 8.
Octopus form ported from Splatoon 2 with its own animations.
Octopus Kraken Royale from Splatoon 3.
Agent 8 gear from Octo Expansion.
Octoling voices and Kraken Royale sound effect.


B-ball Jersey (Away) ---------- Agent 8 Top
Moto Boots --------------------- Agent 8 Heels
Tan Work Boots --------------- Agent 8 Boots

NOTE:
This mod uses a custom Static.pack in order to fix Agent 8 Heels, you can delete it if it gives you conflict with other mods but expect feet clipping through the shoes.
